headline: Jensen Huang Says Nvidia Once Faced A Moment It Could 'Vaporize Overnight' Had A Client Not Taken A $5 Million Leap Of Faith
summary: Nvidia nearly ran out of cash in 1990s but survived after a Sega exec bet $5M on a failing project. Today, valued at trillions, Nvidia dominates in AI.

headline: Trump Just Handed Elon Musk a Long-Sought Victory Over a Powerful Rival
summary: In a move that is being hailed as a victory for Elon Musk, President Trump has called for a review of two leading proxy advisory firms, Institutional Shareholder Services (ISS) and Glass Lewis.

headline: Jeff Bezos Once Revealed His Fantasy Job, But Admits He's 'Super Slow' At It: Amazon Founder Says He's 'Glamorized' That Line Of Work In His Mind
summary: Jeff Bezos said his dream job is being a slow, meticulous craft-cocktail bartender — one who'd need a sign warning customers they can have drinks "good" or "fast," but not both.

headline: Scaramucci Says 25-Year Prison for Sam Bankman-Fried 'Is a Bit Too Much'
summary: Anthony Scaramucci weighed in on whether disgraced crypto founder Sam Bankman-Fried should receive the same clemency recently granted to Changpeng Zhao

headline: Elon Musk's Ultimate Dinner Guests: 3 People Dead Or Alive, Here's His Picks
summary: Elon Musk picks the three people (dead or alive) he would pick for a dinner. Here's his picks.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Adobe, Oracle, GameStop — And DJIA And S&P 500 Hit All-Time Highs
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Broadcom, Oracle, Netflix, And More: 5 Stocks Investors Couldn't Stop Buzzing About This Week
summary: Retail investors talked up five hot stocks this week (Dec. 8 to Dec. 12) on X and Reddit's r/WallStreetBets: AVGO, ORCL, NFLX, MSFT, CVNA.

headline: Buffett's Big Insurance Bet Rakes In $830 Million Since September (CORRECTED)
summary: Berkshire Hathaway increased its position in four stocks in the third quarter. One of those bets is paying off nicely with the total stake up $830 million since Q3.

headline: Bernie Sanders Applauds Bipartisan House Vote Restoring Union Rights For 1 Million Federal Workers: 'Senate Must Pass This'
summary: Sen. Bernie Sanders praised a bipartisan House vote overturning President Donald Trump's order limiting federal union rights, urged the Senate to pass the measure despite uncertain prospects, and tied the fight to broader labor disputes involving Starbucks and Amazon.

headline: Elon Musk Again Slams South Africa's Race Laws As 'Deeply Wrong'
summary: On Friday, Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk said on X that South Africa now has more anti-white laws than it had anti-Black laws during apartheid.

headline: Trump's AI Order Under Fire— Amy Klobuchar Says It's 'Likely Illegal' While Bernie Sanders Calls It 'Extremely Dangerous'
summary: Trump's executive order to curb state-level AI regulations and create a national framework has sparked sharp backlash.
